---
title: "Edward Williams Faithfull"
---

## Edward Williams Faithfull

### Description

Winchester solicitor

### Biography

He was author of <i>Occasional Thoughts</i> (London E. Faithfull and Winchester Jacob and Johnson 1872), a volume of verse published by private subscription, probably sold in aid of the Winchester Hospital.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 30th 1872
- Letter from January 10, 1872.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
